🏆 High-Elo Ace Playbook v11 — REAL DATA

PER-SWING Defense pattern observed in winners. No fabricated "take the chip" advice — the % bar IS the recommendation.
Sample: 18,075 replays (2026-W12+, mode 0). Kept 1510 Ace wins at Elo ≥ 2400.
v3 per-swing data: loaded — 831 games with defense classified
⚡ Enel (Sky Island) (391)🍊 Nami (258)🥊 Lucy (125)🔥 Ace mirror (73)☀️ Yellow Luffy (92)🐵 Luffy (G/R) (59)⚔️ Mihawk (46)⚡ Enel SP (44)🐊 Crocodile (41)🏴‍☠️ Blackbeard (37)🪓 Kalgara SP (37)🧟 Gecko Moria (29)

⚡ vs Enel (Sky Island)

Purple chip pressure + Newgate cheat. Most common matchup.
